Char-Int match: 30,|81,Q|91,[|30,|6,|65,A|100,d|100,d|111,o|110,n|115,s|30,|81,Q|93,]|30,|1,|32, |30,|106,j|76,L|111,o|97,a|100,d|101,e|100,d|32, |97,a|100,d|100,d|111,o|110,n|58,:|30,|1,|30,|2,|32, |102,f|97,a|110,n|99,c|121,y|99,c|104,h|97,a|116,t|32, |30,|1,|30,|106,j|118,v|101,e|114,r|115,s|105,i|111,o|110,n|58,:|30,|1,|30,|2,|32, |48,0|46,.|51,3|32, |30,|1,|30,|106,j|45,-|32, |98,b|121,y|58,:|30,|1,|30,|2,|32, |65,A|114,r|105,i|101,e|108,l|102,f|121,y|30,|1,|
